subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of eternity, wherein lie the mysteries of God, the All-Possessing, the Mighty, the All-Knowing, and wherein is proclaimed that which bringeth glad tidings unto mankind of the meeting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات البقاء و فیها من اسرار الله المهیمن العزیز العلیم و یذکر فیه ما یبشر الناس الی لقاء
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @presence of; reunion with God, @consolation and comfort, @thankfulness; gratitude, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
